name: Coord pull decisions (admin)
description: Admin `repo_pull` decision activity feed (/admin/coord/pull-decisions) from plan 2026-05-30-coord-pull-decision-ui Phase 2 (Feature A). ci-bot is a superuser so the page renders its real content. The page polls GET /api/v1/operations/coord/pull-decisions (optional ?device_id=/?repo= filters) every 10s and renders one PullDecisionCard per resolution row; an empty feed renders the coord-pull-decisions-empty placeholder (expected in prod, since resolution rows are written only when the executor path runs — see page.tsx:13). metadata.routeStubs fulfills the endpoint with two canned resolution rows so the populated feed renders deterministically without live coord: row 1 (verdict `pull`, timing `now`, autonomy `auto_decide`, with an outcome) and row 2 (verdict `diverged`, timing `defer`, autonomy `guidance_only`, no outcome). The stub is load-bearing: remove it and the prod feed is empty → every coord-pull-decision-* card assertion drops to the empty-state placeholder. Authored from a live authed in-process UI Bridge snapshot (85 instrumented elements, route /admin/coord/pull-decisions) captured 2026-06-04. Read-only; structural only.

resolutions.rationale: ff-only safe: on default branch, clean, no local commits.
diverged — unpushed local commits, manual rebase required.

states.name: Coord console shell
states.description: The persistent coord operator-console chrome that renders on every /admin/coord/* route once the superuser gate passes: the h1 title and the left coord-nav with its Pull Decisions link active. Identifies the page mounted under the coord layout, independent of feed data.

assertions.description: h1 'Coord operator console' — the console title proving the coord layout mounted (superuser gate passed, not redirected).
'Pull Decisions' wayfinding crumb (data-testid coord-nav-pull-decisions-active) on the Merge group trigger — the grouped nav surfaces the active section on its group button.

states.name: Feed filters + header
states.description: The Pull-decisions feed card header and its filter controls, which render regardless of whether the feed returned rows: the page container, the feed card, the device_id and repo filter inputs, and the refresh button. These are the stable structural signal that the feed component mounted (past its initial loading skeleton).

states.name: Populated decision feed (route-stubbed)
states.description: The PullDecisionCard rows that render only when the feed returns resolutions, and the per-row decision anatomy they surface. With metadata.routeStubs fulfilling the endpoint with two canned rows, the feed renders: a verdict badge and autonomy chip on every card, a timing chip (Now on row 1, Defer on row 2), an outcome chip on row 1 (which has an outcome), and the muted 'no outcome recorded yet' marker on row 2 (which doesn't) — the Q1 honest-about-uncertainty rendering from the plan. Load-bearing on the stub: without it the prod feed is empty and these assertions drop to the coord-pull-decisions-empty placeholder.

assertions.description: At least one PullDecisionCard (data-testid coord-pull-decision-card) rendered from the stubbed resolutions.
Verdict badge (data-testid coord-pull-decision-verdict) — the pull-safety class per decision.
Autonomy chip (data-testid coord-pull-decision-autonomy) — auto_decide vs guidance_only.
'no outcome recorded yet' marker (data-testid coord-pull-decision-no-outcome) — row 2 has no outcome; the honest-about-uncertainty rendering (plan Q1).
